title: oxalis vulcanicola
intro: Oxalis vulcanicola, also known as the volcanic wood sorrel, is a species of flowering plant in the wood sorrel family that is native to Hawaii. The plant has been used in traditional Hawaiian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Oxalis vulcanicola include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant include tea, poultice, and salve, which can be made by infusing the leaves and flowers in water or oil.
